task: Local Permits & Licenses — city/county bible (sample metro)
disclaimer: Municipal permit and license intelligence from cited public sources — informational only; not legal, zoning, or tax advice. Confirm fees and applicability with the cited city/county authority.
policy: Public municipal .gov sources only; HTTP 403/404 PARKED without bypass; gaps explicit.
notes: Houston has no traditional use zoning — land-use controls rely on deed restrictions and development codes.

regulator.agency: City of Houston — Finance Business Tax

cited_facts.text: The City of Houston collects occupation tax / business registration through the Finance Department; state franchise tax is separate.

cited_facts.text: Houston does not have conventional zoning districts; Planning & Development administers development codes, platting, and deed-restriction tools instead of use zoning.
City of Houston Planning & Development portal: City of Houston Planning and Development Department.
